productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Black Peep Toes
description: Style NoteWe know your ballet flat staples are comfy but can you resist the allure of this pair? Sleek, shiny and sheeny these peep-toe slingbacks have the power to make a simple LBD look uber-glam. Tease your monochrome or pastel favourites with this sky high piece (your next closet essential) You don't have to be a shoe maniac to love this pair - if you're worried about durability then the brand name carlton london should put you at ease. Heel: 5' 2"Product Details Black peep toe slingbacks with a beige printed footbedTapering slim heel with a TPU outsolePlatform under the forefoot for ease of usageMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust, grime or dirtDo not store in direct sunlight
